=================================== FAILURES =================================== __ TestExecuteCommandCopyCommands.test_copy_pr_checkout_script_copies_command __
self = <tests.tui.commands.test_execute_command.TestExecuteCommandCopyCommands object at 0x7f9252648770>
def test_copy_pr_checkout_script_copies_command(self) -> None: """copy_pr_checkout_script copies the PR checkout command with --script.""" row = make_pr_row(123, "Test") executor = FakeCommandExecutor() screen = PlanDetailScreen(row=row, executor=executor, view_mode=ViewMode.PLANS) screen.execute_command("copy_pr_checkout_script") expected_cmd = 'source "$(erk pr checkout 123 --script)"' > assert executor.copied_texts == [expected_cmd] E assert ['source <(er...23 --script)'] == ['source "$(e...3 --script)"'] E E At index 0 diff: 'source <(erk pr checkout 123 --script)' != 'source "$(erk pr checkout 123 --script)"' E
... [150 lines omitted] ...

assert ['source <(er...23 --script)'] == ['source "$(e...3 --script)"'] FAILED tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py::test_checkout_and_teleport_available_when_pr_exists - AssertionError: assert 'copy_teleport_new_slot' in ['close_pr', 'dispatch_to_queue', 'address_remote', 'rebase_remote', 'rewrite_remote', 'open_issue', ...] FAILED tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py::test_checkout_and_teleport_available_with_pr_number - AssertionError: assert 'copy_teleport_new_slot' in ['close_pr', 'dispatch_to_queue', 'address_remote', 'rebase_remote', 'rewrite_remote', 'open_issue', ...] FAILED tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py::test_display_name_copy_pr_checkout_script_shows_pr - assert 'source <(erk...831 --script)' == 'source "$(er...31 --script)"' FAILED tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py::test_commands_available_in_plans_view - AssertionError: Command copy_teleport_new_slot should be available in plans view FAILED tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py::test_get_copy_text_returns_display_name_for_valid_command - session.assistant:
pytest failed: 6 issues found
**Summary:** - **6 failed, 104 passed** in 0.43s - All failures relate to two distinct issues:
**Issue 1: `copy_teleport_new_slot` command not available** (4 failures) - Files: `tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py` - Lines: 104, 116, 878, 890 - The command `copy_teleport_new_slot` is expected to be available but is missing from the available commands list.
**Issue 2: PR checkout script format changed** (2 failures) - Files: `tests/tui/commands/test_execute_command.py` and `tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py` - Lines: 107, 320, 890 - Expected format: `source "$(erk pr checkout NNN --script)"` - Actual format: `source <(erk pr checkout NNN --script)` - The command now uses process substitution `<()` instead of command substitution `$()`
